confirm.prompt: SoH Terrapod De'lIjDaq Slack lo'wI' De' vam rar'a'? Slack vang veb Hoch (chaw'/woD) chaw'meyDaj ghajbogh Terrapod lo'wI' vam moj.
confirm.warning: SlackvaD rarvam Dataghpu'chugh neH taH. DaghajHa'chugh, tabvam SoQmoH 'ej rarQo' — Dung Slack lo' De' SoH Terrapod De'lIjDaq rarvam.
